title: Frontend Console: deliver remaining required views
description: Implement remaining required views in PDR_FRONTEND_CONSOLE: Magnet Event Stream, Confidence/Risk panel, Beads Queue detail/actions, Independent Review panel, PDR generator, Action launcher, Sandbox results.
acceptance_criteria: All required views render and are wired to existing API/WebSocket contracts; targeted E2E tests pass.

title: EPIC: PDR folder completion sweep (frontend + quality + pipeline)
description: Consolidate outstanding work from 08_PDRS into one tracked epic. Scope: frontend console completion, code quality/coverage hardening, bead lifecycle E2E reliability, and sandbox promotion verification.
acceptance_criteria: All child beads complete, CI green on Linux+Windows concurrency lanes, and PDR statuses updated with archived completed docs.

title: Sandbox Lab promotion ladder E2E (L0-L5)
description: Implement end-to-end test coverage for sandbox promotion ladder with enforced security gates at each stage.
acceptance_criteria: Automated tests verify L0-L5 progression and gate enforcement outcomes.

title: Agent Lead handoff integration: stream + queue verification
description: Verify end-to-end flow from mission/magnet outputs through Agent Lead synthesis into Beads queue and frontend visibility.
acceptance_criteria: Integration test validates mission->magnet->agent_lead->bead queue and event stream visibility.
